user_system_path: Issue #220 is the active Product MVP seam. ACTIVE_HANDOFF.md and FOLDERA_BUILD_ORDER.yaml must point at the same issue, and issue #178 must be suspended/queued while the queue file remains inactive/reference-only.
no_routing_contract: The Agent must read ACTIVE_HANDOFF.md, FOLDERA_BUILD_ORDER.yaml, .foldera-contract.json, and docs/SOURCE_OF_TRUTH_MAP.md before acting, and must follow the active issue exactly. The Agent may not ask Brandon to route, repeat, or arbitrate the queue.

terminal_state_authority.merge_through_rule: Merge-through is allowed only after local proof, GitHub checks green, forbidden work touched is NO, and the PR receipt records the source-truth closeout and terminal state.

allowed_files_raw: Issue #220 now authorizes source-truth-only files for the rung 5 advance. No product/runtime files are allowed.
forbidden_files_raw: No live Slack, no Supabase migrations or data mutation, no Vercel settings, no Stripe/auth work, no package/dependency changes, no queue activation, no Dependabot, no live connector fetch, no paid/model call, no fake claims, no runtime/product code changes, and no broad cleanup.
acceptance_condition: ACTIVE_HANDOFF.md, FOLDERA_BUILD_ORDER.yaml, docs/SOURCE_OF_TRUTH_MAP.md, .foldera-contract.json, and the gate/test layer all agree that issue #220 is the active Product MVP seam, issue #178 is suspended/queued, issue #140 is closed by PR #206, issue #168 is completed/superseded, issue #182 is completed and closed, issue #165 is capture-only, and the queue file remains inactive/reference-only. Stripe/payment implementation already exists on main (checkout, webhook, portal, subscription-db, migrations); rung 5 proves the existing path end-to-end and must not rebuild it.
stop_condition: Stop when all gate commands pass and the PR receipt records the source-truth closeout with issue #220 as active.
anti_regression_checks: issue #220 is the active Product MVP seam
Stripe/payment implementation on main must not be rebuilt; rung 5 proves the existing checkout/webhook/portal path
next_command: Begin issue #220 Add bounded self-serve early-access payment path and keep issue #178 suspended/queued until any future activation.
